design_name: Open-top rectangular container with rounded vertical corners (filleted edges), 2mm wall thickness, outer dimensions 60x40x30mm, centered at origin on XY plane
prompt: An open-top rectangular container with rounded vertical corners. The outer dimensions are 60mm (X) by 40mm (Y) by 30mm tall (Z). The four vertical edges are filleted with a 5mm radius, giving the container a smooth rounded-rectangle cross-section. The top face (+Z) is open (removed), and the container is shelled inward with 2mm wall thickness, preserving the outer dimensions. The container sits on the XY plane with its base at Z=0, centered at the origin.
primitive_plan_summary: Open-top rectangular container with rounded vertical corners (filleted edges), 2mm wall thickness, outer dimensions 60x40x30mm, centered at origin on XY plane

verifier_score.feedback: All constraints met. The bounding box is exactly 60×40×30mm, centered at the origin with Z from 0 to 30. The vertical edges are filleted with 5mm radius, creating rounded corners visible in all three views. The top face is open (center view clearly shows the hollow interior), and the shell has 2mm wall thickness inward. The volume of ~15,125 mm³ is physically plausible for a shelled container of these dimensions. The geometry is valid, watertight, and has no self-intersections. The rendered views confirm: isometric shows rounded vertical corners, high-angle rear view shows open top with uniform wall thickness, and front profile shows correct height and smooth rounded edges.

final_verifier_score.feedback: All constraints met. The bounding box is exactly 60×40×30mm, centered at the origin with Z from 0 to 30. The vertical edges are filleted with 5mm radius, creating rounded corners visible in all three views. The top face is open (center view clearly shows the hollow interior), and the shell has 2mm wall thickness inward. The volume of ~15,125 mm³ is physically plausible for a shelled container of these dimensions. The geometry is valid, watertight, and has no self-intersections. The rendered views confirm: isometric shows rounded vertical corners, high-angle rear view shows open top with uniform wall thickness, and front profile shows correct height and smooth rounded edges.
